---
title: "q3"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#get the data

library("data.table")

data <- fread(input = "gunzip -c /ix1/hugen2073-2026s/hw3/Insomnia_sumstats_Jansenetal_sorted.txt.gz")


```
```{r}
#filter out CHR = X
#as.numeric them

library(tidyverse)

data1 <- data %>% filter(CHR != "X")

data1$CHR <- as.numeric(data1$CHR)
```


```{r}
library("qqman")

manhattan(data1, chr = "CHR", bp = "BP", p = "P", snp = "SNP", col = c("lightblue", "pink"), annotatePval = 0.000001)

ggsave("manhattan.png", width = 8, height = 8, units = "cm", dpi = 300)

#png("manhattan.png", w = 8, h = 8, u = "cm", r = 300)
#plot(manhattan(data1, chr = "CHR", bp = "BP", p = "P", snp = "SNP", col = c("lightblue", "pink"), annotatePval = 0.000001))
#dev.off()
```
